description_long: This is a sturdy outdoor bench featuring a combination of dark wooden slats and robust concrete supports. The seat consists of three parallel wooden planks, while the backrest is formed by two wider horizontal wooden boards, all finished in a deep brown or black stain. The bench is supported on each end by thick, L-shaped concrete legs that extend from the ground up to the backrest, providing both stability and a modern aesthetic. The design is minimalistic, with no armrests, and the materials suggest durability against weather and heavy use. The bench is likely intended for public spaces such as parks, sidewalks, or plazas. Its overall appearance is functional yet visually appealing, blending natural and industrial elements.
description: A robust outdoor bench with dark wooden slats and thick concrete supports, designed for public seating. The bench features a backrest and a minimalist, armrest-free style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the bench, highlighting the three seat slats and two backrest boards.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the L-shaped concrete support and the angle of the backrest relative to the seat.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the bench and the solid concrete supports on both ends.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the concrete support and the alignment of the wooden slats.
